sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: PBF Energy (NYSE: PBF) SVP exercises options and sells 62,999 shares
feed.summary: PBF Energy Inc.'s Senior Vice President and General Counsel, Trecia M. Canty, exercised employee stock options for 62,999 shares of Class A common stock at $21.38 per share on March 24, 2026. On the same day, she sold all 62,999 shares at $50.00 per share in an open-market transaction, following an exercise-and-sell pattern. After these transactions, Canty directly owns 191,779 shares of PBF Energy Class A common stock.

feed.title: PYPL DEADLINE NOTICE: PayPal Holdings, Inc. Investors Encouraged to Contact Kirby McInerney LLP By April 20, 2026
feed.summary: Kirby McInerney LLP is encouraging investors who suffered losses on their PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYPL) investments to contact the firm by April 20, 2026, to discuss their rights regarding a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal misrepresented its projected revenue outlook and growth, minimizing risks, leading to a significant stock decline after disappointing earnings and the withdrawal of financial targets. Investors who purchased securities between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026, are eligible to apply to be lead plaintiff in the case.

feed.title: National Energy Services Reunited (NESR) Announces $300 Million in Cementing Contracts
feed.summary: National Energy Services Reunited Corp. (NESR) has secured approximately $300 million in new cementing contracts with clients in Kuwait and North Africa, strengthening its leading position in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region. This announcement follows strong Q4 2025 results and significant contract awards, contributing to a nearly 40% surge in its share price since the start of 2026. CEO Sherif Foda highlighted the strategic importance of these awards for the company's regional scale and technological advancement.

feed.title: Blackrock Fund: In the Face of Triple Shocks from Inflation, Economy, and Interest Rates, How Should Investment Strategies Be Reworked?
feed.summary: This article from Blackrock Fund discusses how investment strategies need to be reevaluated given the triple shocks of inflation, economic shifts, and changing interest rates. It will likely cover Blackrock's recommendations for navigating this complex financial landscape.

feed.title: The General Mills Dividend Yields 6.53%. Is That Enough to Make Up for an Oil Price Shock?
feed.summary: General Mills (GIS) stock has fallen significantly, pushing its dividend yield to 6.53%, but this is largely due to declining equity value and not improved fundamentals. The company faces weakening demand, margin pressure, and increased vulnerability to rising oil prices. Analysts have lowered price targets and maintain a consensus "Hold" rating, questioning if the high dividend yield adequately compensates for these mounting risks and muted financial performance.

feed.title: Honeywell Deal Deepens Defense Role And Shapes Long Term Investment Outlook
feed.summary: Honeywell International has secured a multi-year supplier framework agreement with the U.S. Department of War, including a planned $500 million investment in defense technologies like navigation systems and electronic warfare solutions. This deal enhances Honeywell Aerospace's role as a critical defense equipment supplier and provides long-term production visibility. Investors should consider how this agreement impacts Honeywell's exposure to defense spending, capital allocation, and existing narrative around restructuring and debt coverage.

feed.title: Wynn and Bally’s execs talk UAE and Las Vegas; Michael Gaughan III awarded gaming license
feed.summary: Wynn Resorts and Bally's executives provided updates on their development projects. Wynn Resorts is continuing construction on its $5 billion casino resort in the UAE despite regional conflicts, with an expected opening in early 2027. Bally's discussed development opportunities at the former Tropicana Las Vegas site, where a baseball stadium is under construction, and acknowledged the long-term potential of Bally's Lake Tahoe. Additionally, Michael Gaughan III was awarded a gaming license by the Nevada Gaming Commission despite initial communication issues regarding his application, with the commission acknowledging his family's legacy in the industry.

feed.title: Should Investors Buy the Dip in Micron Stock (MU)? Top Morgan Stanley Analyst Weighs in
feed.summary: Micron Technology (MU) stock has recently pulled back due to profit-taking and concerns about Google’s new TurboQuant compression algorithm impacting memory demand. Despite this, top Morgan Stanley analyst Joseph Moore maintains a bullish outlook, viewing the dip as a buying opportunity. Moore emphasizes the durable strength in memory demand and believes that ongoing shortages will drive the stock significantly higher.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Federal Realty (NYSE: FRT) shows 0 shares
feed.summary: Vanguard has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero beneficial ownership of Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) common stock as of March 13, 2026. This change is attributed to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which disaggregated certain Vanguard subsidiaries for separate reporting in accordance with SEC guidance. The filing clarifies that this is an administrative change in reporting structure and not an economic sale of shares.

feed.title: NXG fund holders can buy new shares at a discount in April
feed.summary: NXG NextGen Infrastructure Income Fund (NYSE: NXG) has announced a transferable rights offering, allowing shareholders to buy new shares at a discount. The record date is April 6, 2026, with a subscription ratio of one new share for every three rights held. The subscription price will be 95% of the 5-day average market price or 92% of the NAV, whichever is lower, and the offering aims to increase the fund's investable assets.

feed.title: Anthropic AI Agents Test Where Pegasystems Holds Long Term Value
feed.summary: Anthropic's new AI capabilities, focusing on autonomous agents, are challenging traditional enterprise software vendors like Pegasystems. Investors are reassessing the long-term value of Pegasystems as the intelligence layer shifts towards external AI platforms, potentially impacting Pegasystems' pricing power and product positioning. While Pegasystems recently reported strong earnings, the tension remains between short-term AI-driven volatility and its core business valuation.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings after internal realignment (GM)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0% beneficial ownership of General Motors Co common stock following an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This administrative change means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing explicitly notes this is a procedural change, not a market transaction indicating a sale of GM shares.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; reports 0 FTNT shares (FTNT)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has reported zero beneficial ownership of Fortinet Inc. (FTNT) common stock following an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This administrative change, in reliance on SEC Release No. 34-39538, means certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will now report their beneficial ownership separately. The filing confirms that The Vanguard Group no longer beneficially owns securities held by these subsidiaries, and it explicitly states 0 shares and 0% of the class are beneficially owned by the parent entity.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: EL) amendment shows 0 shares; subsidiaries to report separately
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amendment to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 beneficial shares and 0% ownership in Estee Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL). This change reflects an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, after which certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will report beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. Vanguard states it no longer beneficially owns the securities held by these disaggregated entities.

feed.title: Chevron reports outage at Australian gas facilities due to cyclone
feed.summary: Chevron's Gorgon and Wheatstone liquefied natural gas facilities in Australia experienced production outages due to Tropical Cyclone Narelle. The company is working to safely restore full production at both sites. These suspensions occur amidst existing pressures on the global LNG market, including the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz and Qatar halting production due to the war on Iran.

feed.title: Energy ETFs Pull In Billions as Oil Rally Fuels Sector Gains
feed.summary: Investors have poured approximately $13 billion into U.S.-listed energy equity ETFs this year, driven by rising oil prices and significant outperformance compared to the broader market. Funds like XLE and VDE are up around 39%, while the S&P 500 has seen a 5% loss, making energy the top-performing sector. Despite these gains, energy's small market weight (about 4%) means the rally has not significantly impacted broad market ETFs.

feed.title: Experience real-time quotes, in-depth charts, and analyst ratings
feed.summary: This page provides detailed stock information for Mega Fortune Company Limited (MGRT) on the Webull platform. It includes real-time quotes, financial data, professional analyst ratings, in-depth charts, and corporate actions. The company, Mega Fortune Co Ltd, is an investment holding company focused on IoT solutions providing services.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings, reports 0% in Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX)
feed.summary: Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% ownership of Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Common Stock. This change follows an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which led certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions to report their ownership separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing emphasizes that The Vanguard Group no longer holds beneficial ownership over securities now reported by these disaggregated entities.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Franklin Resources (NYSE: BEN) shows 0 shares
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Franklin Resources Inc. (NYSE: BEN), reporting zero beneficial ownership due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment disaggregated certain subsidiaries' holdings, meaning these entities will now report their ownership separately according to SEC guidance. The filing clarifies that Vanguard itself no longer holds beneficial ownership of these shares, and investors should look for future filings from Vanguard's associated entities for actual holding information.

feed.title: CarMax ordered to pay $1.1 million, Simi Motorcyclist arrested in chase
feed.summary: CarMax has been ordered to pay $1.1 million in a settlement after being accused of failing to transfer vehicle ownership certificates in a timely manner. Separately, a Simi Valley motorcyclist was arrested on suspicion of felony evading after leading police on a high-speed chase earlier in the month. Ventura County received a portion of the CarMax settlement, and the company has agreed to implement new consumer protection policies.

feed.title: Starbucks (SBUX) CFO has shares withheld to cover RSU tax bill
feed.summary: Starbucks CFO Cathy R. Smith had 2,231.435 shares of Common Stock withheld to cover tax obligations upon the vesting of restricted stock units. This was not an open market sale, but a routine tax-related disposition at a price of $91.98 per share. Following this event, Smith directly holds 63,751.726 Starbucks shares, which includes dividend equivalents on unvested RSUs.

feed.title: Celebrity Cruises is confirmed to visit Royal Caribbean’s new South Pacific private destination – here are the sailings
feed.summary: Celebrity Cruises will begin visiting Royal Caribbean's new private destination at Lelepa in the South Pacific, with two itineraries confirmed for the 2027/28 season. While Royal Caribbean has heavily integrated Lelepa into its Australian itineraries, Celebrity is currently offering a limited number of sailings to the destination, which could expand in future seasons, potentially increasing the presence of ships like Celebrity Solstice in the region. The move highlights a potential strategic differentiation, with Royal Caribbean focusing on the South Pacific and Celebrity offering alternative domestic and occasional South Pacific options.

feed.title: Marvell CEO Murphy sells $2.96 million in shares
feed.summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. CEO and Chairman Matthew J. Murphy sold 30,000 shares of company stock for $2.96 million, with individual transactions ranging from $97.27 to $100.49 per share. This sale occurred under a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan established in December 2025, while the stock was trading near its 52-week high and up 47% over the past year. Following the sale, Murphy directly owns 310,106 shares.

feed.title: Studio City International (NYSE:MSC) Operations And Market Activity Driving Global Expansion
feed.summary: Studio City International (NYSE:MSC) operates an integrated resort on the Cotai Strip in Macau, combining gaming with diverse non-gaming attractions like retail, dining, and entertainment. The company has seen a notable decline in short interest and maintains a business model that emphasizes operational diversification to mitigate risk within the competitive Macau market. Analyst ratings currently reflect a cautious stance with a reiterated sell rating.

feed.title: Adviserplus Holdings Limited agreed to acquire Mentor Business of NatWest Group from NatWest Group plc.
feed.summary: Adviserplus Holdings Limited has agreed to acquire the Mentor Business from NatWest Group plc, with the deal expected to close in the second half of 2026. This acquisition is part of NatWest Group's streamlining efforts, following other recent news related to the banking company. NatWest Group plc is a UK-based banking company serving customers in England and Wales.

feed.title: Oracle bets bigger on Nashville with room for 2,000 workers
feed.summary: Oracle has signed a new lease for 116,000 square feet at The Neuhoff District in Nashville, expanding its total office capacity in the city to approximately 2,000 seats across three locations. This move supports planned local hiring and growth for its cloud and AI teams, reinforcing Oracle's long-term commitment to Nashville's tech community. The expansion is part of Oracle's broader strategy to invest in physical infrastructure, talent development, and community engagement in the region.

feed.title: Gartner: LLMs to be up to 100X more cost-efficient by 2030
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that by 2030, large language model (LLM) training costs will decrease by 90% due to advancements in semiconductor technology, model design, and increased chip utilization. However, overall inference costs are expected to rise as demand for tokens grows disproportionately to the decline in token prices, especially with the adoption of agentic-led frontier intelligence. Enterprises are advised not to rely solely on cheap tokens, as advanced reasoning still requires significant computational resources.

feed.title: Navios Maritime Partners (NMM) insider adds 3,747 units under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Angeliki Frangou, a director, officer, and major unitholder of Navios Maritime Partners L.P. (NMM), indirectly purchased 3,747 common units through an affiliated entity, Raymar Investments S.A., between March 24 and March 26, 2026. These transactions, executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, increased her beneficial ownership to 4,682,488 common units indirectly and 366,766 directly. Additionally, an affiliated entity, Olympos Maritime Ltd., holds 622,296 general partnership units, representing approximately 2.1% of NMM's outstanding units.

feed.title: Madrigal Grants Equity Awards to Seven New Employees
feed.summary: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDGL) has granted equity awards to seven new non-executive employees as inducement awards under its 2025 Inducement Plan. These awards, consisting of 1,739 time-based restricted stock units, will vest in four equal annual installments, contingent on continued employment. The grants were made to attract and incentivize the new hires at the biopharmaceutical company, which focuses on developing treatments for a liver disease called metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis.

feed.title: NIO Stock Price Falls as Nasdaq Correction Bites and March Delivery Hurdle Looms
feed.summary: NIO Inc.'s shares fell 3.8% as the Nasdaq entered a correction, impacting growth stocks including other EV manufacturers. This downturn comes as NIO faces a significant March delivery target of 32,000-35,000 vehicles to meet its first-quarter guidance. The market's shift, driven by Middle East geopolitical concerns and rising oil prices, adds pressure despite NIO recently reporting its first quarterly net profit.

This change means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing emphasizes that The Vanguard Group no longer claims beneficial ownership over these disaggregated securities.
